title: When David Attenborough met Prince George, one giant shark tooth stole the moment
summary_full: A prehistoric shark tooth gifted by Sir David Attenborough to Prince George at Kensington Palace captivated the world. This massive fossil, from the extinct Otodus megalodon, offered a glimpse into ancient oceans and sparked a brief international dispute over its origin. The image's enduring appeal lies in its blend of royal formality, scientific wonder, and a child's natural curiosity.
